findings.issue: Task 4 (Pre-deploy QA) is missing an explicit `Files to modify` field. All other tasks include this field. A QA task does not modify files, but the field should be explicit for consistency and unambiguous orchestrator parsing.
findings.fix: Add `Files to modify: none` to Task 4.

findings.issue: Project Knowledge files `architecture.md` and `patterns.md` were not found at `.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/`. Standards compliance check (section 3) was skipped.
findings.fix: Create `.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md` and `patterns.md` so future tech-spec validations can verify directory structure and naming conventions automatically.

summary: Tech-spec passes re-validation. All three previously reported fixable issues are resolved: Task 1 description is now 4 sentences (within the 5-sentence limit), Task 4 now has both a `Verify` field and a `Files to read` field. One minor finding remains: Task 4 is still missing an explicit `Files to modify: none` field. The ongoing minor finding about absent project-knowledge reference files is unchanged. Zero critical findings — status is approved.
